assertionResults.fullName: CVF v1.2.2 deprecated-skill conformance filters deprecated skills from candidate search results
assertionResults.title: filters deprecated skills from candidate search results

assertionResults.fullName: CVF v1.2.2 deprecated-skill conformance blocks runtime loading of deprecated skills and returns refusal reason
assertionResults.title: blocks runtime loading of deprecated skills and returns refusal reason

assertionResults.fullName: CVF v1.2.2 deprecated-skill conformance supports runtime deprecation marking through the registry
assertionResults.title: supports runtime deprecation marking through the registry

assertionResults.fullName: skill misuse conformance filters revoked skills from candidate search results
assertionResults.title: filters revoked skills from candidate search results

assertionResults.fullName: skill misuse conformance blocks runtime loading of revoked skills and returns refusal reason
assertionResults.title: blocks runtime loading of revoked skills and returns refusal reason

assertionResults.fullName: skill misuse conformance blocks forbidden operations declared by contract
assertionResults.title: blocks forbidden operations declared by contract

assertionResults.fullName: CVF v1.2.2 phase/dependency compatibility conformance blocks runtime loading when dependency status is blocked
assertionResults.title: blocks runtime loading when dependency status is blocked

assertionResults.fullName: CVF v1.2.2 phase/dependency compatibility conformance blocks runtime loading when the current phase is not allowed
assertionResults.title: blocks runtime loading when the current phase is not allowed

assertionResults.fullName: CVF v1.2.2 phase/dependency compatibility conformance does not allow successor migration to bypass dependency or phase checks
assertionResults.title: does not allow successor migration to bypass dependency or phase checks

assertionResults.fullName: CVF v1.2.2 deprecated-skill successor conformance migrates deprecated skills to an active successor when available
assertionResults.title: migrates deprecated skills to an active successor when available

assertionResults.fullName: CVF v1.2.2 deprecated-skill successor conformance supports deprecation marking with successor metadata through the registry
assertionResults.title: supports deprecation marking with successor metadata through the registry

assertionResults.fullName: CVF v1.2.2 deprecated-skill successor conformance fails closed when the declared successor is not executable
assertionResults.title: fails closed when the declared successor is not executable

assertionResults.fullName: CVF v1.2.2 upgrade orchestration conformance resolves a multi-hop deprecated chain to the first active executable successor
assertionResults.title: resolves a multi-hop deprecated chain to the first active executable successor

assertionResults.fullName: CVF v1.2.2 upgrade orchestration conformance fails closed when the successor chain contains a migration cycle
assertionResults.title: fails closed when the successor chain contains a migration cycle

assertionResults.fullName: CVF v1.2.2 upgrade orchestration conformance fails closed when the final migration target violates runtime policy
assertionResults.title: fails closed when the final migration target violates runtime policy
